metadata.title: National Women's Safety Map
metadata.description: Explore nationwide women's safety information — CCTV, emergency bells, safe return routes, and crime caution zones on an interactive map.

panel.title: Layer Filter
panel.subtitle: Select information to show on the map

layerInfo.IF_0085_WMS:
• Risk map based on sexual violence incidents over the past year
• Higher risk areas appear in darker colors (10 levels)
layerInfo.IF_0083_WMS:
• Risk map based on violence incidents over the past year
• Higher risk areas appear in darker colors (10 levels)
layerInfo.IF_0079_WMS:
• Risk map based on nighttime (8pm–midnight) sexual violence incidents over the past 3 years
• Higher risk areas appear in darker colors (10 levels)
• Gray shaded areas have no nearby safety facilities (CCTV, street lights, etc.). Take extra caution in these areas
layerInfo.IF_0078_WMS:
• Risk map based on nighttime (8pm–midnight) violence incidents over the past 3 years
• Higher risk areas appear in darker colors (10 levels)
• Gray shaded areas have no nearby safety facilities (CCTV, street lights, etc.). Take extra caution in these areas
layerInfo.cctv:
• Locations of outdoor CCTV cameras installed for public safety
• Includes number of cameras and coverage direction per location
layerInfo.smart-street-lights:
• Smart street lights equipped with CCTV and various sensors
• Some support emergency reporting features
• May include WiFi and beacon connectivity
layerInfo.emergency-bells:
• Emergency bell locations in parks, restrooms, parking lots, and streets
• Pressing the button triggers an alarm. Some bells automatically alert police or security, and some support two-way voice calls
layerInfo.delivery-boxes:
• Secure unmanned parcel lockers in public spaces — receive deliveries safely on your own
• Operating hours may vary by day (weekday, Saturday, holiday)
layerInfo.IF_0102_WMS:
• Security light locations managed by local governments
• Helps identify well-lit areas for safer nighttime walking
layerInfo.safe-return-routes:
• Designated safe walking routes home in Seoul (362 routes total)
• Currently available for Seoul only
layerInfo.safe-stores:
• 24-hour convenience stores designated as safe havens
• If you're in danger, go inside and press the emergency bell — police will respond immediately
layerInfo.IF_0023_WMS:
• Areas designed to reduce crime through better lighting, visibility, and controlled access
• These zones are relatively safer environments
layerInfo.IF_0036_WMS:
• Locations of police stations and substations
• Use this layer to find the nearest police facility in an emergency
layerInfo.IF_0032_WMS:
• Emergency bell locations in parks, restrooms, parking lots, and streets
• Does not include convenience store bells or fire alarms
• Pressing the button triggers an alarm. Some bells automatically alert police or security, and some support two-way voice calls
